extends.description: Declare template inheritance from a parent template. The child template may override blocks defined by the parent.
extends.caveat: The extends tag must appear before any output, except whitespace or comments.

block.description: Define a named block that can be overridden by child templates during template inheritance.
block.caveat: Block names must be unique within a template.

for.syntax: {% for target in iterable %}...{% else %}...{% endfor %}
for.description: Iterate over an iterable (such as a list, tuple, or dict) and render the block for each item.
for.caveat: Loop variables are only available inside the loop body.
